theft.intro: In a theft case, proof should show ownership of the item and circumstances of the theft.
evidence_list: IMEI or serial number for device
Any nearby shop or street camera details
documents: Complaint copy or FIR copy if filed
important_notes: Report theft quickly to improve recovery chances.
Keep IMEI or serial number ready for stolen devices.
theft.next_step: Collect ownership proof and file complaint or FIR immediately.

fraud.intro: Fraud cases need proof of false promise, dishonest intention, and financial or property loss.
important_notes: Do not delete transaction messages or screenshots.
fraud.next_step: Organize financial and communication proof before filing complaint.

assault.intro: Assault cases require proof of injury, attack, and involvement of the opposite party.
important_notes: Medical examination should be done as early as possible.
Take clear injury photos before they fade.
assault.next_step: Get medical treatment first and preserve injury evidence immediately.

domestic violence.intro: Domestic violence may include physical, emotional, verbal, sexual, or economic abuse, so different kinds of proof may help.
evidence_list: Financial proof in case of economic abuse
important_notes: Keep evidence in a safe place away from the abuser if needed.
domestic violence.next_step: Ensure safety, then gather medical and communication evidence.

defamation.intro: Defamation cases need proof of false statements and proof that reputation was harmed.
evidence_list: Proof that statement was shared publicly
documents: Copies of online or printed content
Any legal notice sent or received
important_notes: Take screenshots quickly before the content is deleted.
Keep date and source of publication clearly recorded.
defamation.next_step: Save the defamatory content immediately and document where it appeared.

cyber crime.intro: Cyber crime cases require digital evidence showing account misuse, fraud, hacking, impersonation, or online abuse.
evidence_list: Phone number or email used by accused
documents: Bank details if money loss happened
important_notes: Do not delete chats, mails, or account notifications.
Report quickly in online fraud cases.
cyber crime.next_step: Preserve digital proof and file complaint with cyber crime authorities.
